description: Complementary push-pull amplifier with NPN/PNP symmetry

match_rules.topology_hint: NPN and PNP in complementary pair, sharing same signal path

input.description: Input coupling cap at left edge, center height

npn_upper.description: NPN transistors in upper half (closer to V+)

pnp_lower.description: PNP transistors in lower half (closer to V-)

bias_chain.description: Bias resistors/diodes in center between NPN and PNP

feedback.description: Feedback path wraps back from output, below circuit

wiring_hint: Power rails V+/V-/GND labeled. All signal paths direct wires. Mirror symmetry top/bottom.
